headlines.title: Dow Jumps to Record Closing High After Soft US Jobs Data, Nasdaq Down With Chip Shares
Facing barbs and pressure from Trump, Europe's leaders close ranks
Trump administration plans new rule that it says could save Medicare patients $1.1 billion
UBS cuts Brent crude price forecasts on improved Hormuz oil flows
Brent Falls to $70.47 & OPEC+ Supply Decision Test US Oil Supply Recovery

notes: US markets closed mixed on July 2, 2026, ahead of the long Independence Day holiday weekend. Soft June non-farm payrolls data eased rate hike fears.
Semiconductor stocks sold off sharply for a second straight day, pulling the NASDAQ down 0.8%.
Crude prices traded lower or mostly flat amid easing geopolitical tensions and improved oil transit flows through the Strait of Hormuz.
